title: Plan, implement and review a quality assurance program
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan, implement and review a quality assurance program demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine QA objectives for the workplace

pcs.text: Assess future market requirements for quality assured products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess future market requirements for quality assured products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess future market requirements for quality assured products.

pcs.text: Identify relevant QA programs and costs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant QA programs and costs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant QA programs and costs.

pcs.text: Assess strategic benefits of a QA program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess strategic benefits of a QA program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess strategic benefits of a QA program.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine QA objectives for the workplace

elements.title: Plan the QA program and develop implementation strategies

pcs.text: Define product quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define product quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define product quality standards.

pcs.text: Audit current status of products and operations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Audit current status of products and operations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Audit current status of products and operations.

pcs.text: Evaluate and cost industry QA programs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate and cost industry QA programs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate and cost industry QA programs.

pcs.text: Select QA program based on a cost benefit analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select QA program based on a cost benefit analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select QA program based on a cost benefit analysis.

pcs.text: Document required processes and practices in the QA program manual and prepare an implementation plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document required processes and practices in the QA program manual and prepare an implementation plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document required processes and practices in the QA program manual and prepare an implementation plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan the QA program and develop implementation strategies

elements.title: Implement the QA program

pcs.text: Document instructions defining task and process requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document instructions defining task and process requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document instructions defining task and process requirements.

pcs.text: Introduce or consult on changes to processes and practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Introduce or consult on changes to processes and practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Introduce or consult on changes to processes and practices.

pcs.text: Implement contractor and staff training
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement contractor and staff training?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement contractor and staff training.

pcs.text: Establish processes to monitor and verify product quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish processes to monitor and verify product quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish processes to monitor and verify product quality.

pcs.text: Introduce recording systems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Introduce recording systems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Introduce recording systems.

pcs.text: Validate operating instructions under conditions to verify their suitability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Validate operating instructions under conditions to verify their suitability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Validate operating instructions under conditions to verify their suitability.

pcs.text: Analyse problems and issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse problems and issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse problems and issues.

pcs.text: Undertake corrective and preventative actions to resolve problems and issues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake corrective and preventative actions to resolve problems and issues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake corrective and preventative actions to resolve problems and issues.

pcs.text: Conduct system analysis
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct system analysis?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct system analysis.

pcs.text: Implement mechanisms for gaining feedback information

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
